# Thread: Analyzer Pipeline Phase 2 Closeout

Tracking the formal close of Phase 2 for the Analyzer Pipeline project.

## Status

Closed 2026-05-09. Phase 2 acceptance criteria all passed. Project moved to archive. `~/tools/active` symlink removed.

## What was done

- Classification module: complete, 98.2% accuracy on test corpus.
- Routing rules engine wired in: all 12 doc types routing correctly.
- End-to-end test suite: 47/47 passing.
- Project archived at `~/projects/archive/analyzer-pipeline`.
- Active symlink `~/tools/active` removed.

## Notes

Phase 3 (confidence scoring + review queue) deferred. No timeline. Will reopen if G decides to proceed.
